summary: Tested Notification Center feature (iteration 25). Backend: 14/14 tests passed for GET /api/notifications-feed. Frontend: All core features working - bell icon visible with badge, navigation to /notifications screen, 'Obavještenja' title, type badges (Vijest/Događaj/Ponuda), Pročitano button, back navigation. One medium bug found: future-dated events always remain unread.

minor.issue: Events with future date field used as created_at remain permanently 'unread'. Backend sets event created_at = e.get('date', e.get('created_at', '')) — a future event date like '2026-09-15' is always newer than any mark-all-read timestamp. Fix: swap precedence to e.get('created_at', e.get('date', '')).

integration_issues.flow: Mark all read - future events stay unread
integration_issues.issue: After clicking 'Pročitano', badge reduced from 9→1 (not 0). The remaining unread item is 'Dani Šljive 2026' event with date=2026-09-15. Because backend maps event created_at to the event date (2026-09-15), it will always be newer than any notif_last_seen timestamp, so it never gets marked as read.

react_native_issues.issue: MINOR: When /notifications is navigated directly via URL (not from app), router.back() emits 'GO_BACK not handled' warning. This is expected in web preview but not an issue in normal app flow (tested: navigating from home → notifications → back works correctly).

action_items: FIX (MEDIUM): In server.py get_notifications_feed, change event created_at from e.get('date', e.get('created_at', '')) to e.get('created_at', e.get('date', '')). This ensures future-dated events do not permanently appear as unread after user marks all read.
ADD testIDs to HomeTab bell button (bellBtn), bell badge (bellBadge), Pročitano button (readAllBtn), and notification card items for better automated testing coverage.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 546: Event created_at is set to event.date rather than event.created_at. `"created_at": e.get("date", e.get("created_at", ""))` — swapping precedence to `e.get("created_at", e.get("date", ""))` would fix the permanent-unread bug for future events.
HomeTab.tsx: Missing testID on bellBtn and bellBadge elements — makes automated testing less reliable.
notifications.tsx: Missing testID on readAllBtn (Pročitano) and notification card TouchableOpacity — reduces testability.
server.py line 566: str() wrapping for sort key is correct fix for mixed datetime/str type sorting bug (was previously causing 500 errors, now fixed).

success_rate.frontend: 90% (9/10 core features verified; 'Pročitano' partial - reduces count but can't reach 0 due to future event date bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification Center feature is mostly working. Backend API is 100% passing. The main bug is: future-dated event (Dani Šljive 2026, date=2026-09-15) always shows as unread because backend sets event.created_at to the event date field (future date > any lastSeen timestamp). Fix is a 1-line change in server.py. All UI elements verified: bell icon with badge, navigation to /notifications, Obavještenja title, type badges, Pročitano button, Pogledaj ponudu CTA on offer items (4 offers present). Back navigation works in normal flow.
rca_of_issue: BUG: Unread badge never reaches 0 even after clicking Pročitano when future events exist. RCA: In get_notifications_feed (server.py line ~546), the event's created_at is set to `e.get('date', e.get('created_at', ''))`. For an event with date='2026-09-15' (a future date), this becomes created_at='2026-09-15'. When user clicks Pročitano, notif_last_seen is set to current time (~2026-04-23T...). The isNew check in frontend: `String(item.created_at) > lastSeen` → '2026-09-15' > '2026-04-23T...' is TRUE → event stays unread forever. Fix: server.py, swap to `e.get('created_at', e.get('date', ''))` to use actual DB creation time.
